title: EnderGrab
description: Allow endermen to pick up entities!
body:
Ever wish an Endermen could pick up more than just blocks?  **Today is your lucky day!**

This is **Fabric Mod** that allows endermen to pick up any entity within a 2-block range of them, carrying them around on their head until they randomly decide to drop them off. **Even players can be grabbed!**

![Alex sitting on an enderman + endermen in a stack](https://i.imgur.com/vEEUFkt.png)
